rules.name: panic
rules.pattern: \b(panicking|panic attack|feel panicked|feeling anxious|I('m| am| was) (anxious|spiraling)|in a spiral)\b
responses: Are you somewhere safe right now?
What helps when it gets like this?

rules.name: triggered
responses: What did you do with it?

rules.name: sad
rules.pattern: I('m| am| was| feel| felt) (so |really |very )?(sad|upset|heartbroken|down|in tears)|(I've been |I have been )(sad|crying|grieving)|\bcried today\b

rules.name: angry
rules.pattern: I('m| am| was| feel| felt) (so |really )?(angry|mad|furious|pissed|full of rage)|(I've been |I have been )(angry|resentful)|\bI raged\b
responses: What would you say if you could?

rules.name: overwhelmed
rules.pattern: I('m| am| feel| felt| was) overwhelmed|\b(too much at once|can't cope|everything at once|all at once)\b
responses: What's the biggest piece right now?
Can you set one thing down?

rules.name: happy
rules.pattern: I('m| am| feel| felt| was) (so |really )?(happy|relieved|excited|grateful)|\b(good day|great day|better today)\b
